title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.360 - Private use of trust funds prohibited
text:
214.360.  Private use of trust funds prohibited. — No cemetery operator, nor any director, officer or shareholder of any cemetery may borrow or in any other way make use of the endowed care trust funds for his own use, directly or indirectly, or for furthering or developing his or any other cemetery, nor may any trustee lend or make such funds available for said purpose or for the use of any operator or any director, officer or shareholder of any cemetery.
(L. 1961 p. 538 § 14, A.L. 1994 S.B. 496 § 214.360 subsec. 1, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1692, et al. merged with H.B. 2226, et al. merged with S.B. 754)
